name: Suspicious Compression Tool Parameters
description: Detection of suspicious command-line arguments used with data compression tools. Adversaries often use these tools to stage data for exfiltration or to hide malicious files, and specific parameters can indicate malicious intent.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a compression tool, **{file}**, was executed with suspicious command-line parameters: **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Collection** and **Exfiltration** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1560**), where an adversary is likely preparing to steal data or hide malicious files. The event occurred under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to perform a full forensic analysis of the affected files.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The name of the compression tool that was executed.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed with the suspicious parameters.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
